title: CashTransferPaymentModalityTypeValues
description:
A payment method where funds are transferred electronically between banks through secure financial networks.

Comment:
Example:

Sending €10,000 internationally through bank wire.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account-to-Account Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A payment method where funds are debited from the payers bank account and credited directly to the beneficiarys bank account.

Comment:
Example:

Customer transfers €500 from their checking account to another persons savings account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A payment method where the payer provides physical cash to initiate the transfer, and the beneficiary may receive funds in cash or in an account.

Comment:
Example:

Customer deposits €1,000 cash at a branch to send money to another person.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Card Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A payment method where the transfer is initiated using a debit or credit card.

Comment:
Example:

Sending money through a mobile app using a debit card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A payment method where the beneficiary (payee) is authorized to collect funds directly from the payers account.

Comment:
Example:

Utility company automatically debits €120 for electricity bills.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Standing Order Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A payment method where the payer instructs the bank to automatically transfer a fixed amount at regular intervals.

Comment:
Example:

Monthly €800 rent payment automatically transferred to landlord.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Instant Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A payment method where funds are transferred and made available to the recipient almost immediately.

Comment:
Example:

Sending €50 through an instant payment system, received within seconds.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Digital Wallet Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A payment method where transfers are initiated through mobile applications or digital wallets.

Comment:
Example:

Sending money using a mobile banking app or digital wallet.
